personas.name: Mindful Emma
personas.description: A self-aware individual seeking to understand and manage her emotions through mood tracking and self-reflection.
goals: Reflect on my daily activities and feelings
Identify patterns and areas for improvement
pain_points: Difficulty finding a user-friendly and insightful mood tracking app
Struggling to maintain a consistent tracking habit
constraints: Limited time for tracking and reflection
Seeking a simple and intuitive app

personas.name: Stressed Alex
personas.description: An individual dealing with stress and seeking mental health support and stress management tools.
pain_points: Lack of accessible and effective mental health resources
constraints: Limited access to mental health professionals

personas.name: Curious Ryan
personas.description: An individual interested in learning more about mental health and wellness through informational content and insights.
goals: Learn about mental health and wellness
Stay informed about new developments and research
pain_points: Difficulty finding reliable and engaging mental health content
Limited time for reading and learning

personas.name: Frugal Sarah
personas.description: An individual concerned about the cost and limitations of paid features in mental health apps.
goals: Access useful features without breaking the bank
pain_points: Difficulty finding free or low-cost alternatives
constraints: Limited budget for mental health resources

personas.name: Private Paige
personas.description: An individual concerned about data privacy and trust in mental health apps.
goals: Trust mental health apps with sensitive information
pain_points: Concerns about data breaches and misuse
Difficulty finding transparent and secure apps
